findings.detail: "要件定義プロセスのさな目的" — OCR corruption: "主な" misread as "さな" (character-level OCR error). JP text retains corrupted reading. ZH/EN silently corrected to "根本目的" / "underlying purpose". Cross-language inconsistency: JP fails, ZH/EN pass.

evidence.jp_text: 要件定義プロセスのさな目的はユーザーのニーズを知ること。
evidence.zh_text: 其根本目的在于了解用户的需求。
evidence.en_text: Its underlying purpose is to understand user needs.

findings.detail: DevOps JP definition contains an appended sentence "プロトタイピング、プログラムの構造仕様書などで、内部構造を見ること" — this describes ホワイトボックステスト, not DevOps. OCR boundary error merged content from a neighboring block. ZH/EN propagated this contaminated text faithfully.

evidence.jp_text: DevOpsとは、開発側と運用側が連携してシステム化を実現する考え方。プロトタイピング、プログラムの構造仕様書などで、内部構造を見ることである。
evidence.zh_text: DevOps 是一种开发方与运维方紧密协作以实现系统化的思想，常借助原型设计和程序结构说明书来掌握内部结构。
evidence.en_text: DevOps is a philosophy in which development and operations cooperate to deliver systems, often using prototyping and structural specifications to understand the internals.

findings.detail: セキュリティ・バイ・デフォルト JP def contains two OCR artifacts: (1) "PCのお初期化" — spurious "お" prefix on 初期化; (2) "COS の組み合わせ" — spurious "C" prefix on OS. ZH correctly renders "初始化" and "OS". EN also correct. JP definition is inaccurate for learners reading JP-only.

evidence.jp_text: PCのお初期化やCOSの組み合わせを最初から考慮して、出荷時にOSのセキュリティの設定を行うこと
evidence.zh_text: 从一开始就考虑PC的初始化和OS的组合，在出厂时进行OS的安全设置
evidence.en_text: Considering PC initialization and OS combinations from the outset, and configuring OS security settings at the time of shipment

findings.detail: アジャイル開発 JP def: "一定期間ごとに、ウォーターフォール・モデルなどで" is incoherent — Agile development is explicitly contrasted with, not based on, the waterfall model. Sentence is OCR noise contaminating the JP text. ZH/EN silently omitted this incoherence and rendered correct meaning.

evidence.jp_text: アジャイル開発、反復型開発などを覚えておく。一定期間ごとに、ウォーターフォール・モデルなどで、仕様変更に強い。
evidence.zh_text: 需要掌握敏捷开发与迭代型开发等方法。它们以固定周期反复推进开发，对需求变更适应性强。
evidence.en_text: Remember Agile development and iterative development. These approaches progress in fixed cycles and are robust against specification changes.

findings.detail: U+30FB KATAKANA MIDDLE DOT (・) at position 33 in ZH def for PDCA Cycle: "检查・评价". This is a Japanese-script character (Katakana block) that must not appear in Chinese text. Should be replaced with · (U+00B7 MIDDLE DOT) or the Chinese connective 与/和.

evidence.zh_text: 对应「计划」的选项是 Plan，对应「实施」的是 Do，对应「检查・评价」的是 Check，对应「改进」的是 Act。

findings.detail: JP-style corner-bracket quotation marks 「」used in ZH definitions across 4 leaves. Standard mainland Chinese typography requires double curly quotation marks () or book title marks (《》). Affects: PDCA Cycle (p562), SLM (p562), SSL/TLS (p566), HTTPS (p566).

evidence.zh_snippet: 对应「计划」的选项是 Plan
持续维持并改进「服务级别」的活动

findings.detail: Term 可用性 (Availability) appears on two pages with different definitions: p563 = ITSM availability ('service usable when needed'), p566 = CIA triad availability ('access to necessary information assets'). Both are conceptually valid but different exam contexts. No cross-reference annotation linking the two occurrences.

evidence.p563_def_jp: サービスを利用したいときに利用できること
evidence.p566_def_jp: 必要な情報資産にアクセスできること

findings.detail: Non-standard ZH IT surface terms: デュプレックスシステム→"双联系统" (should be 双机热备 or 主备系统) and デュアルシステム→"双工系统" (双工 in Chinese means full-duplex communications, not dual-processing). Conceptual definitions are accurate; only the surface label is non-standard for mainland IT learners.

evidence.duplex_def_zh: 由主运行计算机和为故障待命的计算机两台计算机构成的系统结构
evidence.dual_def_zh: 两台计算机执行相同处理，并对结果进行核对以确认正确性的系统构成

summary: Chunk 55 covers 4 pages (562, 563, 565, 566; page 564 absent). 141 entities audited (134 terms, 5 sections, 2 headings). 3 HIGH findings: two OCR errors in JP text (p562::2 'さな目的' corruption, p566::27 'お初期化'/'COS' artifacts) and one concept-contamination in DevOps definition (p562::21) where a ホワイトボックステスト sentence was appended. 2 MEDIUM character-level issues: U+30FB katakana middle dot in ZH field (p562::29) and JP-style 「」brackets in ZH across 4 leaves (p562, p566). 1 MEDIUM cross-page duplicate: 可用性 defined differently in ITSM vs CIA triad contexts without cross-reference. 1 MEDIUM garbled JP for Agile (p562::20). 1 LOW unconventional ZH terminology for duplex/dual systems (p563). No U+FFFD replacement characters. All required fields populated. ZH/EN silently correct JP OCR errors in 3 of 4 HIGH/MEDIUM cases, creating JP-only accuracy degradation.
